since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.87%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.31% · BTC +2.19% · Gold -0.45% · Nasdaq100 -0.44%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.87%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.87%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.88%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.88%, VRT +5.21%, MU +5.14%, INTC +4.70%, PWR +4.40%. Laggards: SPCX -10.38%, AVAV -10.28%, ARM -7.41%, GOOGL -5.94%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.38% at $165.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
